overall.description: First-person exploration of a foggy offshore industrial platform in a video game. The player character, holding a hammer, walks along metal walkways and pipes, briefly looks down into the foggy water below, passes a yellow forklift, and ascends external stairs on an industrial structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls

events.description: exits narrow enclosed corridor onto open industrial platform walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow metal corridors holding a hammer, emerging onto exterior platform

wooden structural beams supporting the corridor ceiling
large horizontal industrial pipe running along the corridor
metal railings along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls and wooden support beams. The player walks forward holding a hammer, then emerges onto an exterior platform walkway with metal railings and yellow industrial pipes visible against a foggy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior platform walkway with foggy ocean view

events.description: looks down over the platform railing into the foggy water below

agents.ego_description: walking along exterior platform railing then stopping to look down into the foggy water

entered.detail: foggy ocean visible beyond the platform edge
tall communication antenna structures on the platform
large industrial crane structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving along the exterior platform walkway with metal railings, the foggy ocean becomes visible beyond the platform edge. Industrial cranes and antenna towers stand in the distance. The player stops to look down over the railing into the foggy water below.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial platform deck with forklift and equipment

events.description: looks up from the water view back to platform level
approaches and passes a yellow forklift parked on the platform

agents.ego_description: walking across the platform deck past industrial equipment and a yellow forklift

notable_agents.action: yellow forklift parked on the platform deck

entered.detail: yellow industrial forklift parked on the platform

segments.scene_description: Looking up from the water view, the player continues walking across the open platform deck. A yellow forklift is parked ahead, and large cylindrical industrial tanks become visible. The industrial crane structure becomes more prominent on the left as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: platform area with metal grate walkways and large storage tanks

events.description: walks onto metal grate walkway allowing view down to lower levels

agents.ego_description: walking between large cylindrical tanks across metal grate flooring

entered.detail: metal grate flooring allowing view through to lower levels
large industrial building with external staircases
external metal stairs attached to industrial building

segments.scene_description: The player moves between large cylindrical storage tanks, walking across metal grate walkways that allow views down to lower platform levels. A large industrial building with external stairs becomes visible ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial structure with external metal stairway

events.description: begins ascending external metal stairs on industrial building

agents.ego_description: climbing external metal stairs on the side of an industrial structure

entered.detail: steep external metal staircase being climbed
complex network of industrial pipes and valves

segments.scene_description: Approaching the industrial building, the player begins ascending the external metal stairs. The camera moves upward along the staircase, with industrial piping systems visible on the left and the large industrial structure now on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped industrial interior out onto a sprawling, fog-shrouded offshore platform. It begins within a narrow corridor of corrugated metal and wooden beams, moving forward until the space opens onto an exterior walkway lined with yellow pipes and metal railings. As the camera progresses, the view expands to reveal a foggy ocean with distant cranes and antenna towers, pausing briefly to look down into the misty water below before continuing across the open deck. The scene then shifts past a parked yellow forklift and large cylindrical storage tanks, crossing metal grate walkways that expose the lower levels of the facility. Finally, the camera approaches a large industrial building and begins ascending a set of external metal stairs, moving upward alongside a complex system of piping.
